info.title: Soccer Field Booking & Management API
info.description:
REST API for the soccer field booking platform.

- **Bookings are system-created only** — they are generated automatically when a Match is formed (via MatchPost accept or Lobby auto-match). Users cannot create bookings directly.
- Most routes require a JWT in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header. Obtain one via `POST /api/auth/login`.
- Tokens expire after **1 hour**.
- A few read routes are public (browsing lobbies / match-posts, the calendar occupied-slots feed).

tags.name: Venues
tags.description: Venue-owner self-service: complexes, fields, schedules, manual bookings

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not permitted (not owner / not admin)

post.summary: Log in and receive a JWT

200.description: Token + user. Use `token` as the Bearer credential.
